titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 987b

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=986 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 10:59:47.513205+00 | translation moa=987 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 10:59:47.503593+00

p.cl:
Ricardus dei gracia humilis minister ęcclesie sancti andree vniuersis filiis ma
tris ecclesie salutem .

Sciant tam posteri quam presentes nos concessisse et dedisse ec
clesie beate marie de celchou ecclesiam sancti laurentii de berewic liberam et
quietam ab omni exactione et sinodalibus in perpetuam elemosinam .

hiis testibus
andrea archidiacono . Galfrido abbate de dunefermelin . Iohanne nepote
Rodberti episcopi . Robert canonico sancti Andree . Roberto filio sewlfi .
Magistro herberto alexandro capellano . Magistro abraham .
Richard, by the grace of God a humble servant of the church of St Andrew, to all sons of Mother Church sends greeting.

Let those to come as well as those present know me to have granted and given, to the church of blessed Mary at Kelso, the church of St Laurence at Berwick, free and quit from every demand and synodal due, in everlasting alms.
